title: Smart Novelty Car Puzzle Erasers，LIUHUIZEYU Car Eraser Creative Pencil Erasers Set Removable Eraser for Boy Carnival and School Supplies (4 Pcs)
features: 【Eliminates Writing Errors】The small eraser can easily erase pencil marks from books in a practical and convenient way. It is an indispensable study partner in every pencil case.
【Cool Design】The eraser is specially designed in the shape of a small car, a very cool and personalised design. It can be disassembled and assembled to train boys' practical skills.
【Reliable Material】Car eraser is made of high quality rubber, soft and durable. Harmless to schoolchild. It can be disassembled many times without being easily damaged.
【What You Get】4 x sports car erasers in mixed colours. Our eraser set is great for use as a collectible ornament or for entertaining on a plane or train ride.
【Wide Applications】These fun erasers are brightly coloured, cute and bright. It is a must for any treasure box, classroom snack or Christmas stocking at school or Christmas parties.
